## Missing Pages (must be created as Blogger Pages)

| # | Slug | Page Type | Priority | Referenced From | Content Template |
|---|------|-----------|----------|-----------------|------------------|
| 1 | `/p/about.html` | Core Page | HIGH | Mobile nav, desktop nav, "About Us" CTA, author CTA, footer Quick Links | See `docs/page-templates/about.md` |
| 2 | `/p/services.html` | Core Page | HIGH | Sidebar, footer Quick Links, footer Services | See `docs/page-templates/services.md` |
| 3 | `/p/contact.html` | Core Page | HIGH | Mobile nav, desktop nav | See `docs/page-templates/contact.md` |
| 4 | `/p/free-seo-audit.html` | Landing Page | HIGH | Post/article CTA box | See `docs/page-templates/free-seo-audit.md` |
| 5 | `/p/privacy-policy.html` | Legal | MEDIUM | Footer Resources, copyright footer | See `docs/page-templates/privacy-policy.md` |
| 6 | `/p/terms.html` | Legal | MEDIUM | Footer Resources, copyright footer | See `docs/page-templates/terms.md` |
| 7 | `/p/disclaimer.html` | Legal | MEDIUM | Footer Resources (appears twice) | See `docs/page-templates/disclaimer.md` |

**Note:** `/blog` is referenced in footer Quick Links but is not a standard Blogger URL. Consider replacing with `/` (homepage) or a custom label page.

## Theme Anomalies to Fix

### Anomaly 1: LinkList6 (Services Footer) â€” Misaligned text/link pairs

| Text Label | Current Link | Expected Link |
|------------|-------------|---------------|
| "Content Marketing" (text-5) | `/p/services.html` | `/search/label/Content%20Marketing` |
| "Ecommerce SEO" (text-8) | `/search/label/AI%20SEO` | `/search/label/Ecommerce%20SEO` |

### Anomaly 2: `/blog` Quick Link

`/blog` is not a standard Blogger URL. Replace with `/` or a label page.

### Anomaly 3: Service Cards Have No Links

The 6 service cards in the "Our SEO Services" section have no CTA links. The `.service-link` CSS class exists but is unused in the HTML.
